cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out how many animals are listed in these tables. So the question gives me two tables, one for penguins and one for giraffes. Again, the first line is the header. Let me count each giraffe: 1. Jody 2. Gladys 3. Marian 4. Donna That's 4 giraffes as well. So each table has 4 animals. Adding them together, 4 penguins plus 4 giraffes equals 8 animals total. Let me check again to make sure I didn't miss any lines.
